name: Potato Bonda (Urulaikizhangu Bonda)
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Black Gram Dal (Washed Urad Dal), Picked Over
2 cups Bengal Gram Flour (Besan, Chickpea Flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in their jackets. Peel them and mash well.
2. TEMPERING: Heat 3 tablespoons ghee in a heavy saucepan. Add mustard seeds, black gram dal, halved red chili, and curry leaves. When the mustard seeds splutter, add green chilies, ginger, and onions. Saute for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add mashed potatoes, salt to taste, ground turmeric, and chopped coriander leaves. Cook until thoroughly blended. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Shape the potato mixture into lemon-sized balls. Set aside.
5. TO MAKE BATTER: In a large mixing bowl, combine Bengal gram flour, red chili powder, asafoetida powder, and salt to taste. Add enough water to make a smooth batter of dropping consistency.
6. Heat oil for deep-frying. Dip each potato ball into the batter and fry until golden brown in color.
7. Serve hot with chutney.
